_comment: Species: Miemie Origin True Body (灭灭本源真身) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Miemie Origin True Body

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of destruction-origin 8 m, body radiates annihilating light
canonical.size: 8 m manifestation, 0 jin (destruction); true form spans destruction-realms
canonical.behavior: Destruction-origin-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing destruction-essence; Wang Lin obtained as treasure
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained Miemie origin true body as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: miemie_origin_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
